title: 1 step DFU - Content of the Software Update tab when there is update available for Earbuds and Charge Case
scenario: Verify the Software Update tab displays current/available versions, release notes, individual Update buttons, and an Update All button when updates are available for both Earbuds and Charge Case.
steps: Start the app with Osprey EB and CC (both with at least version 5039) and there is an update for both.
expected: Data for earbuds and charge case showing current/available version and release notes. Each component has an "Update" button and there is an additional "Update All" button.
